caption: Adana kebab off the ocakbaşı, hand-chopped lamb, urfa biber and pul biber balance. Main Street, tonight.
Iskender kebab station — sliced lamb, house pide, yogurt, tomato-butter. Wayne dinner service.
Baklava layers. Gaziantep antep fıstığı. Homemade, always.
Pide ovens fired for lunch. Sucuklu, kaşarlı, ıspanaklı. Main Street 11am.
Lahmacun — thin crust, lamb mince, parsley, lemon. The kind you fold and eat walking.
Adana blend ground fresh Saturday morning. Chile-forward. Cumin holds back.
Ocakbaşı charcoal glow before dinner rush. This is why the meat tastes right.
Iftar prep coming — mosque partnership again this Ramadan. Dates, corba, kuzu, baklava.
Kerem hitting his form for belt assessment. Tiger Martial Arts crew is sharp.
Galatasaray 4 - Beşiktaş 0. Kids stayed up. Worth it.
Sunday kahvaltı. Menemen, sucuk, olive, cheese, simit, tomato, cucumber, çay. Non-negotiable.
Van Houten rehab month one. Barbershop tenant getting a fresh sign.
Erdogan wedding — 120 guests, iskender station on the floor, baklava trays x10.
Kuzu incik slow-braised eight hours. Sunday special.
Turkish Cultural Center fall fundraiser catering — 90 guests, Anatolia crew.
Halal Meat receiving dock Thursday 6am — Green Village Packing PA.
Adana kebab on the mangal tonight. Yusuf's blend from the fresh Adana biber. Main Street counter open till 10.
Iskender platter — house yogurt, hot brown butter, Bursa-style bread. Wayne dinner special this weekend.
Fresh lahmacun paper-thin, sumac and lemon on top. $6 lunch special Main Street this week.
Baklava tray coming out of the oven. Pistachios from Gaziantep via my brother. Nothing else compares.
Ramadan iftar setup at Main Street tonight. Lamb pilaf, lentil soup, dates, ayran. 200 plates for the mosque community. Sponsored.
Wayne dinner service — grill working. Osman ready. Reservations tight this weekend.
Adana harci freshly ground this morning. Urfa pul biber, sumak, cumin, kekik, tuz. This is our house blend since 2012.
Turkish cultural center fall fundraiser. Full catering from Main Street. 180 guests, 4-course, Adana + tavuk + veggie kebab + baklava.
Sunday kahvalti at the Rivera house. Menemen, sucuk, feta, olives, tomato, cucumber, borek, honey, tea. Family only.
Charcoal ready at 6am. Main Street starts prep for lunch rush. First flames of the day are always mine.
Wayne staff meal before dinner. Kofte, pilav, salata. We eat before service every night.
Wedding catering setup — 120 guests, Turkish community. Kuzu şiş, tavuk şiş, veggie, pide, meze, künefe. Yusuf and I ran the line.
Pide out of the oven — kaşarli sucuklu. Long boat shape, fresh from the wood stone at Main Street.
Turkish tea in tulip glasses. Six glasses a day minimum. This is the culture.
Menemen prep with tomato, green pepper, egg, sucuk. Weekend brunch upgrade at Wayne.
Emre helping bus tables Saturday evening. Learning the business from the floor up. Proud of him.
Kerem's taekwondo belt test today. Green belt achieved. Home celebration with iskender and baklava.
Elif's violin recital Saturday. Cezayirli Gassan Paşa piece. Ayse recording. My heart proud.
Anatolia Wayne — 5 years open this month. Thank you to everyone who has walked through our door.
Frank Moretti CPA finishing our Q3 books. Food cost 31%, tight. Menu review coming November.
Halal meat delivery Thursday morning. Pennsylvania slaughterhouse. Kuzu 40kg, tavuk 60kg fresh. Yusuf inspects each cut.
Ayse birthday dinner at home. Grilled sea bass, coconut rice, salata, baklava with pistachio. Nov 5.
Hatice mom's birthday kahvalti spread. Menemen, sucuk, cheese, olives, honey. Video call with Mehmet in Gaziantep. Dec 12.
Winter surf... no — fishing at Island Beach with Hasan. Striped bass. Early morning.
Adana kebab tutorial video coming to YouTube channel. Grinding blade angle, fat ratio, harci mix. Everything explained.
Mehmet's spice shipment arrived from Gaziantep. Fresh Urfa biber, kekik, isot. Yusuf testing tonight.
Van Houten property tenant meeting. Marcos and Ana renewed the lease. 12 months more. Good tenants.
Turkish Cultural Center Tavla night Wednesday. My table with Faruk, Selim, Hasan. I lost twice, won once.
Wayne Family Dental Thursdays — Ayse at work. My hygienist wife. She keeps our smiles healthy.
Main Street lunch rush at 12:30. Full house. Line moving. Yusuf on grill. This is what I love.
Kids Sunday morning helping with lokum making. Cornstarch everywhere. Rosewater in the pot. Family kitchen.
Menu board update — winter warm dishes coming. Kuru fasulye, ezogelin çorbası, iç pilav. November through March.
Turkish coffee cezve on the stove. Fine grind, cold water, foam control. This is not espresso.
Mosque food pantry delivery Friday after Jumu'ah. 50 meals prepared at Main Street kitchen. Community first.
Winter fig from the tree in my backyard. First frost soon. Preserve time with cinnamon and clove.
Loopnet listing — I looked at a strip mall in Wayne. Not the right time. Save more cash first.
BiggerPockets book of the month — David Greene, Long Distance Real Estate. Actually applies to me. Reading tonight.
Emre's soccer game Saturday. He scored. 3-1 win. Family dinner celebration at home. Adana for the striker.
Wayne kitchen equipment loan payoff plan. December 5 target. $28k left. Almost there.
Q4 estimated taxes with Frank on the 15th. Every quarter this same routine. Preparation prevents pain.
Insurance renewal review with Selim — Travelers, $11.5k combined. Restaurant + property. Locked another year.
Health inspection window mid-November. Main Street prep — log books ready, staff briefed. Routine.
Yusuf's daughter graduated culinary school. Proud father, proud boss. Yusuf a chef for us since 2014.
Derya's promotion — Wayne floor manager to co-manager. She's earned every step. Congratulations.
Osman's iskender pide came out perfect tonight. Fixed the oven kalibrasyon. Consistency back.
Turkish community winter wedding December 19. 120 guests. Full Main Street catering. Yusuf leading kitchen.
Thanksgiving both Anatolia locations closed for family day. First time in 5 years. Need this rest.
Portland trip planning — not us — Ayse's cousin visits from OR next spring. Dinner at Wayne planned.
Mehmet's video call morning kahvalti. Gaziantep 4pm, Paterson 8am. Time zones don't beat family.
Fishing trip Island Beach with Hasan — striped bass caught 4. Grilling with garlic and lemon. Old school.
Kerem's birthday cake — chocolate not sugar-heavy for the diabetic family concerns. Dec 20 celebration.
Jason's birthday Jan 22 — kids made card, Ayse made cake. Started the year 47. Grateful.
A1C recheck with Dr. Osman coming February. Metformin dose steady. Walking more after dinner.
Amlodipine 5mg twice daily. BP steady 132/85 average this month. Small wins matter.
Adana harci ratio — 30% Urfa biber, 30% pul biber, 20% sumak, 10% kekik, 10% tuz karışım. House secret.
Wayne dinner menu upgrade — added grilled lokma seafood shish. New fish supplier Rockaway. Fresh daily.
Real estate side — Van Houten monthly rent collected on the 1st. All three tenants current. Peace.
Turkish tea culture explanation for Elif's school presentation. Two-pot method, çaydanlık, sugar cube on tongue. She listened.
Anatolia catering pipeline — $18k this quarter, target $40k end of year. Corporate lunch outreach starting.
Frank's Q3 P&L review meeting scheduled. Food cost issue, menu pricing decisions. Numbers first, feelings second.
Selim confirmed the Marcos and Ana lease renewal — 12 months, same rate. Papers signed Friday.
Ramazan iftar planning — Main Street will do 200 plates every Friday. Mosque handling logistics.
Kids Sunday morning waking up for kahvalti — best rhythm of the week. Family first.
Hasan and I fishing next Saturday if weather holds. Wayne dinner shift Derya's. Freedom weekend.
Emre's PS5 savings — $500 target, 2 months. Ayse in charge of tracking. He's disciplined.
Elif reading Orhan Pamuk translated for school. She asked for Turkish original. Ordered from Istanbul.
Kerem's soccer game after his brother's — he plays U10. Coach positioned him striker. Speed matters.
Hatice birthday spread with Mehmet on video call. Cake with 72 candles metaphorically. Actual 2. Safety.
Prep for Turkish Cultural Center fall dinner — menu locked. Full team. This is our biggest catering yet.
Wayne bar update — no alcohol served. Turkish coffee, tea, ayran, sherbetler are the drinks. Family friendly.
Main Street lunch counter open till 3pm today — extra hours for the Turkish community after Jumu'ah.
Winter squash from the farm market — kabak dolması coming to Wayne menu Monday. Traditional.
Mehmet sent photos from Anne's clinic visit yesterday. She's steady. Insulin dose adjusted slightly.
Hatice bedtime insulin routine — 20 units Lantus each night, Humalog sliding scale. Ayse trained us all.
Turkish tea supplier switch — Caykur Rize confirmed monthly delivery. Fresh boxes at Main Street.
Kerem's belt promotion certificate framed for the kitchen wall. Family pride visible for customers.
Ayse's dental office thank-you card from a patient — 40 years of care. She earned it.
Winter menu preview — kuru fasulye, ezogelin, iç pilav, patlıcan musakka. Comfort food season.
Insurance ticket at Travelers submitted for review. Selim tracking. Reply expected end of month.
Van Houten disposal issue — plumber called for Marcos. Repair done Saturday morning. Owner covers.
Osman's new sos yogurdu batch — thicker consistency for iskender. Small change makes big difference.
Selim's monthly reminder — Van Houten property tax due end of Q4. Escrow ready.
Emre's biology test 90. Ayse said he studied hard. Dinner reward baklava. This is the deal.
Frank confirmed Q3 estimated tax paid. Q4 estimate coming January 15. Prep starts now.
Wayne Family Dental sent Ayse's schedule for December. She's off the 24-31. Family time protected.
